mapper.select:
select * from t_scenic_spot
and (name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or address like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or description like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and category = #{category}
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into t_scenic_spot (name, category, price, address, image, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{name}, #{category}, #{price}, #{address}, #{image}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update t_scenic_spot set name = #{name}, category = #{category}, price = #{price}, address = #{address}, image = #{image}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
